headline: B4B Payments Expands Partnership with Thredd to Power U.S. Growth
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 12, 2026--Thredd, the AI-first issuer processing platform, today announced the expansion of their partnership with B4B Payments (B4B), a leading global payments provider. Following years of successful collaboration across the UK and Europe, B4B has entrusted Thredd to further support and scale its U.S. programs, building on B4B Payments’ established presence in the market.

raw.headline: B4B Payments Expands Partnership with Thredd to Power U.S. Growth
raw.summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 12, 2026--Thredd, the AI-first issuer processing platform, today announced the expansion of their partnership with B4B Payments (B4B), a leading global payments provider. headline: Visa Expands Travel And Cross Border Payment Uses As Shares Screen Undervalued
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) and Trip.com Group launched a global virtual travel card program aimed at improving online and in destination travel payments. The program is designed to support smoother transactions between travelers and travel partners as international travel activity continues to recover. Separately, Citcon expanded Visa Direct’s cross border money movement capabilities for more than 3,000 merchants. The Citcon integration supports faster push payments for payouts and refunds to cards, bank...
